title: helia pendula
intro: Helia pendula, also known as Heliotropium pendulum, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Helia pendula can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
